ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policyholders" (
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policyholder */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the policyholder */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the policyholder */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Location code of the policyholder's residence */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the policyholder */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the policyholder */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the policyholder */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the policyholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary contact email */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the policyholder resides */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel used to acquire the policyholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., corporate auto, personal auto) */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Level of coverage (e.g., basic, extended, premium) */,
  "effective_to_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the policy */,
  "monthly_premium_auto" INTEGER /* Monthly premium for the policy */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder who purchased the policy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Renewal status of the policy (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel used to sell the policy */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the policy is sold */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who issued the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("sales_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Class of the vehicle (e.g., four-door car, suv) */,
  "vehicle_size" TEXT /* Size of the vehicle (e.g., medsize) */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy that insures the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "registered_owner" TEXT /* Name of the registered owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was filed */,
  "claim_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy under which the claim was filed */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the claim */,
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claims adjuster handling the claim */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was settled */,
  "settlement_amount" INTEGER /* Final amount settled for the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_adjuster_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjuster_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewals" (
  "renewal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewal offer */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the renewal offer was made */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* Type of offer made (e.g., offer1, offer2, offer3) */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy being renewed */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal (e.g., accepted, declined) */,
  "renewal_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the renewal offer */,
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claims adjuster handling the renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewals_adjuster_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjuster_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewals_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "sales_channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., agent, call center, branch) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the sales channel operates */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the sales channel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sales channel */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the sales channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_channels_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., central, west region) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., underwriter, claims adjuster) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor of the employee */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions or access levels of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
